entry.title: Re: Organizational level of supplier evaluation in SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hello, 

There is an app Overall Supplier Evaluation that shows KPI regarding supplier evaluation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/97954958371c9144e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

You can set here filters default for user, to see evaluated suppliers on required organisation level.

As for different criteria in each Company Code, you can create a Template specifically for each Company requirement and users will be able to choose the one that interests them. Here you will find whole documentation regarding use of Supplier Evaluation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/178e7dae5abe4d4aaa55f434aba4f703.html?locale=en-US

And here regarding supplier evaluation results:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/99edf736476e46c397f2529886750117.html?locale=en-US

Best regards, 

Jagoda Drwiega

For the rest, it should still be simpler to simulate the buttons. I don't know why you can't batch input the button you have mentioned. It's the function code KEPH. What exactly happens if you use it with BDC_OKCODE, why doesn't it go further?

entry.title: Re: Erroneous Authentication Popup when Previewing Fiori Application in BAS
entry.content:
@rotem_puterman-sobe,

Thanks for the suggestion.  Interestingly, last time I saw the issue was on Friday.  I did not check again until today (Monday) and I do no currently see the behavior.  In fact, after checking today, I shutdown the docker container and the dev space, waited about 3 hours, and then re-started the docker container and dev space.  I checked again and still don't see the erroneous behavior.

I'll check again tomorrow and once I see the behavior occur, I will try your suggestion.

"No artifact file (.iflw) found. Add a file to the project."

Thanks,

Prasanthi

entry.title: Preferred unit of measure
entry.content:
Hi,

Please clarify how preferred units of measure is intended to work in Public cloud?

Unit of measure conversion

Preferred unit of measure BAG.

1.) Is it possible to maintain pref.unit of measure in warehouse level?

2.) If PO is created in 48pcs -> inbound 48 pcs -> why system creates task as 1 PAL?

3.) In outbound scenario, is pref. unit of measure supposed to be the unit in picking task?

In customizing the stock.specific unit of measure is BAG only.

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content:
The call transaction does not allow you to take into account the buttons I asked for on the last screen.

Here is my code:

PERFORM bdc_dynpro USING 'SAPLCKDI' '4610'.
PERFORM bdc_field USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '/00'.
PERFORM bdc_field USING 'BDC_CURSOR' 'CKI64A-KLVAR'.
PERFORM bdc_field USING 'CKI64A-KLVAR' ws_costing-klvar.
PERFORM bdc_field USING 'BDC_OKCODE' '=KEPH'.

ws_opt-nobinpt = 'X'.
ws_opt-dismode = 'N'.
ws_opt-updmode = 'A'.

CALL TRANSACTION 'CU50' USING bdcdata
OPTIONS FROM ws_opt
INTO wt_messtab.

I tried to modify the dismode option with different values but the OK_CODE =KEPH is not taken into account.

Please let me know if anyone has implemented SM30 functionality using RAP?

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: Re: How can I make non-key field columns editable on Fior...
entry.content: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-configuration-object..html

entry.title: Text for field IOHEADER-GSTRI (Actual start time) wrong in PP Orders - S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Problems

Text for field IOHEADER-GSTRI (Actual start time) wrong in Englis/Spanish. Report standard COOIS – Header. Example in Systems.

 

The solution is to apply the notes:

A.- 155376 - CO26-28: Text for field IOHEADER-GSTRI wrong
The text for field IOHEADER-GSTRI is 'Actual start time' instead of 'Actual start date' in the field selection dialog.
Solution
Change the text for field IOHEADER-GSTRI as follows:
1. Start report RCOTX000 in transaction SE38.
2. Enter IOHEADER as the field string name, maintenance language E
(for English), order category 10
3. Execute (F8)
4. Scroll to the line, where Field is GSTRI
5. Change the text 'Actual start time' in column eight (from the left)
to 'Actual start date'
6. Save the changes

If the note for item A does not work, apply the note:

B.- 2568682 - COOIS: Field 'Actual start time' is duplicate - follow up of note 520429.

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: Its a very exciting time to be in Payroll, thanks for the great overview.

entry.title: Re: how to set Granted user's company as a target population
entry.content:
Hi,

Just create one role.

Create 10 different granted population assign each administrator on the group

Create 10 different target population as per your requirement. 

now, on the role, create a new assignment by clicking "add role assignment", with the desired granted and population on it, here you can configure in such a way, that HRBP's from USA can only see the employees from the country USA or Employee's belongs to the company codes in USA. 

Create assignment, on the define a target population section, select the radio button of "Filtered by" enable "permission group" here you will get the select the target population and then save.

Thanks. 

Nisha

entry.title: oninit rule not triggered after employee import
entry.content:
Hello community,

We've configured to autopoulate the value "5" for "working days per week' field, this oninit rule successfully works in add new employee, but the value does not autopopulate using import employee data

entry.title: Access Performance Forms Directly from SAP SuccessFactors Stories: New in 1H 2025!
entry.content:
Overview

A highly anticipated enhancement is now available in SAP SuccessFactors Stories as part of the 1H 2025 release, offering the ability to open Performance Management forms directly from a Stories, in Print Preview format.

With just a click on the Document ID, users can jump straight to the PM form without being part of the route map.

Let’s explore how this works and walk through the step-by-step configuration so anyone (even first-time Story designers) can build this into their reports.

Why Is This Feature Important?

  • View the Performance Management form from within a report

  • If you have access to PM form data in Stories, the direct deeplink can be configured in Stories, providing you access to PM form
  • No need to navigate to other modules or be in the performance management workflow
  • Based on a Customer Influence Idea - it’s built from customer feedback!

What You’ll Need

Before you begin, make sure:

  • You have access to Stories in Report Center.

  • You have the data permission: User > Performance > Data Access: Story

Step-by-Step Guide: Configure Hyperlink to PM Forms

Step 1: Create a New Story Report

  1. Go to Report Center > Create > Story

  2. Choose Optimized Design Experience
  3. Click Create

Step 2: Select the Data Connection

  1. In the popup, choose:

    • SAP Live Connection

    • Select SAPSFSFREP

  2. Click OK

Step 3: Use Query Designer

  1. In Query Designer, From Available Schemas:

    • Expand the schema Performance Management

    • Select a Performance form template

  2. Drag towards the left to add Form Template and Form, then select fields like Document ID and Form Template Name or other relevant fields in your report.

  3. Important: Ensure Document ID is added as a Dimension

    • Click the Column Overview icon

    • Confirm it appears under Dimension, not Measure, as shown in the snapshot below.
    • Click on Preview Query, verify sample data output, and click Finish so the system navigates you to Story Designer.

Step 4: Add a Table to the Story

  1. In the Story Designer, from the menu bar or the left pane, add a Table Widget.

  2. From the Builder Panel, under Table Structure, Choose Cross Tab. If the Builder panel is not visible, select the right side panel from Menu bar.
  3. From the Builder Panel again, add Dimensions: Document ID, Form Template Name.

Step 5: Add Hyperlink to Document ID

  1. Click on the Document ID column, click the 3-dot (More Actions) menu on the right.

  2. Click + Add > Hyperlink

Configure the hyperlink:

  • Link To: External URL

  • External URL: Enter the below 
    https://<your-SuccessFactors-domain>/sf/printPreviewPMForm?fDataId=Document ID
     
    Example:
    https://hcm2preview.sapsf.eu/sf/printPreviewPMForm?fDataId=Document ID

Pro Tip: Copy the domain directly from your logged-in browser tab.

  • Expand IN USE

  • Select Document ID (don’t type manually)
  • Check Open in new tab
  • Ensure the URL configuration appears as shown in snapshot below
  • Click Done

Step 6: Enable the Hyperlinks in the Table

  1. Click the top left of the table widget

  2. Choose Navigate to External URL
  3. Click to enable “Show Hyperlinks in Table”

Now, each Document ID will be a clickable link that opens the employee’s PM form in Print Preview mode.

You're Done!

With just a few simple steps, you've enabled seamless, direct access to Performance forms within Stories, enhancing usability, speeding up reviews, and reducing admin overhead.

This enhancement is a big win for HR teams, managers, and power users who rely on Performance data for decision-making.

Final Tips

  • Test the hyperlink in View mode to ensure it's working as expected

  • You can also create filters or add employee-specific info to personalize the report

Let’s Keep the Ideas Coming!

This feature was delivered via Customer Influence, a powerful way to shape SAP's roadmap. Don’t forget to vote, comment, and share your ideas in the Customer Influence Portal.

And if this guide helped you, leave a like, drop a comment, or hit that Kudos button!

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals  SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics #1H2025Release

entry.title: Re: Whitholding Tax Configuration in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud P...
entry.content: Yes

entry.title: Set Document Class
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm trying to set document type C1 in transaction F-28, but it doesn't appear. In the User Parameters tab (SU01), I added the BAR parameter, and whenever I access the F-28 TRX, it shows me document type DZ.

Is there another way to set the document type?

Thank you.

#FI

entry.title: Activity type Assignment is not available in FSM mobile App
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working on creating activities via the SAP FSM mobile application. While I am able to view and create different activity types such as Tasks, Meetings, etc., these activities do not appear on the dispatching board.

After comparing the activities created through the web by the dispatcher or the ones replicated for the ERP, I noticed that those displayed on the dispatching board are of type Assignment, which unfortunately is not available as an option on the mobile app.

Could you kindly advise on how to address this? The objective is to enable technicians to independently report activities related to a service order from the mobile app, with these activities then replicated as new items in SAP S/4HANA Service (Private Edition).

Your support in resolving this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: In S4 HANA Public Cloud where do I find Configuration...
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thank you for your question.

“Define Versions” leads to MRP and not Costing in your S/4HANA Public Cloud because the search term corresponds to a more generic SSCUI for planning versions used in MRP. To access costing versions, use SSCUI 102617 or ensure you are in the Product Cost Planning configuration area with scope item BJE activated.

 

Checkpoint

 What to Do

Incorrect Role Assigned

Ensure the role SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT (Business Process Configuration Expert) is assigned to your user.

Scope Item Not Activated

Confirm that Scope Item BJE – Product Cost Planning is activated in your system.

Search Too Broad

Instead of searching “Define Versions”, use the specific SSCUI number: 102617 to go directly to the correct configuration.

App Filter Too Narrow

Expand your filters by selecting All Application Areas, or specifically Finance, to view relevant costing-related apps.

Just let me know if it works

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: IDEA integration for Turkey Incoming invoices

you may consider contacting on eof the service providers. here is one withe their information in the SAP Store:

Martin

entry.title: Management for Deprecated or Decommissioned CDS Views with an upgrade
entry.content:
We have upgraded our Sandbox environment from 1909 to 2023 and noticed that a few CDS views are no longer available by default and are deleted as of SAP S/4HANA 2023 release. What is the process to identify which CDS views are deprecated or replacing any deprecated CDS views with the successor? With each software upgrade, we understand there will be occurrences of deprecated CDS views or deprecated CDS view elements in the custom content, How do we find out which are deprecated or how do we utilize the Extensibility Inventory app to identify the deprecation? Is there way we can get a list or a link for SAP HELP to identify the deprecated CDS views in advance as these are out of the box CDS views that are being consumed in our environment?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Management for Deprecated or Decommissioned CDS Views...
entry.content:
In order to manage upcoming deprecation of CDS views, please review the following documentation on the SAP Help Portal:

Learning About Deprecated CDS Views | SAP Help Portal

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Create Service Order by technicians from SAP FSM and replicate it to SAP S4HANA Service
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope you are doing well.

We are currently implementing SAP Field Service Management integrated with SAP S/4HANA Service (Private Edition) using SAP CPI.

As part of the project scope, we have a scenario where technicians should be able to report new issues directly from the field — meaning without an existing service order.

Could you please advise on the optimal way to handle this scenario?
Would it be possible to create a new service order directly from the SAP FSM mobile application?

The intended process is to create a service order from the mobile app, linked to the relevant equipment, and replicate it to SAP S/4HANA Service. From there, the service administrator would assign the appropriate service item and Spare parts before sending it back to FSM for planning and execution.

I would appreciate your guidance on how best to implement this process.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

Thanks again but this isn't the issue either.  ID 102617 takes me to Profitability Area.

entry.title: Re: how shipping pt. get capture in OBD via transfer posting
entry.content:
Please check SAP KBA 3067316 - Shipping Point in delivery created from post goods movement (MIGO) - SAP for Me

Also, check what you have configured under Logistics Execution-->Decentralized WMS Integration-->Inventory Management Interface and Delivery-Relevant Data-->Define Default Values for Deliveries

entry.content:
Realmente é uma pena a SAP somente disponibilizar a abertura do campo para, de forma manual, ele ser desmarcado. Numa empresa com solucao de automacao (VIM, SERRALA, READSOFT, etc.), essa solucao nao atende.

Gostaria de saber qual foi o racional ou interpretacao da SAP para ele vir como estatistico, uma vez que o retorno simbolico sim tem que aparecer nos livros fiscais/SPED ?

entry.title: Re: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option missing
entry.content: Will do but other than that they acknowledge it and forward it to the dev team no updates.

entry.title: Invoice Validation with SAP Document Information Extraction API & Python
entry.content:
Invoices are essential, but validating them manually can be tedious and error-prone. In this blog post, we’ll walk through a Python-based workflow that leverages SAP’s Document Information Extraction (DOX) API to extract invoice data and intelligently compare it against contract records. The goal? Validate invoices and highlight discrepancies—all in one go.

Supported document types for the SAP Document Information Extraction Service include supplier invoice, purchase order, payment advice, and business cards. More to come in the roadmap.

This blog post builds on an excellent introductory guide by Joni – here – which covers getting started with SAP DOX API and testing it via Swagger. Here, we introduce Python logic. This post builds upon an understanding of SAP DOX API, with Python modelling doing the heavy lifting of:

  • OCR-based document post and extraction (via SAP DOX API)
  • Confidence scoring and validation of key fields
  • Automatic detection and reporting of mismatches

TL;DR: Automate invoice data extraction and validation using SAP DOX API and Python. OCR your PDFs, validate against expected fields with confidence scoring, and flag mismatches—all in one streamlined Python pipeline.

This guide is for: SAP BTP developers, automation engineers, finance teams exploring DOX integration, or anyone dealing with high-volume invoice processing.

Step 1: Authentication with SAP BTP

First, we authenticate against SAP BTP using OAuth 2.0 to retrieve an access token.
Update <TENANT> to your SAP BTP tenant name.

The Bearer Token is required for all subsequent API calls to the DOX endpoint.

import requests
import json
 
client_id = ""
client_secret = ""
oauth_url = "https://<TENANT>.authentication.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials"
 
# Get access token
def get_access_token():
    token_response = requests.post(
        oauth_url,
        data={
            "grant_type": "client_credentials",
            "client_id": client_id,
            "client_secret": client_secret,
        },
        headers={
            "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        }
    )
    
    if token_response.status_code == 200:
        return token_response.json().get("access_token")
    else:
        raise Exception(f"Failed to get token: {token_response.status_code} - {token_response.text}")

Step 2: Submitting an Invoice PDF for Document Information Extraction

Next, we upload a sample invoice PDF (in this case, Thai_Invoice_with_TH_date.pdf) to the DOX API. The POST/document/jobs endpoint performs a document submission (e.g a pdf, png or jpeg file) for asynchronous processing. If successful, the API returns a job ID which we use to track and fetch the results. This ID can be used with other endpoints, including GET/document/jobs/{id} and DELETE/document/jobs/{id}.

Sample Invoice:

import requests

url = "https://<TENANT>.ap10.doc.cloud.sap/document-information-extraction/v1/document/jobs"
access_token = get_access_token()
file_path = "Thai_Invoice_with_TH_date.pdf"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}",
    "accept": "application/json"
}

# simulate -F flags in curl
files = {
    'file': (file_path, open(file_path, 'rb'), 'application/pdf'),
    'options': (
        None,
        '''{
            "schemaName": "SAP_invoice_schema",
            "clientId": "c_00",
            "documentType": "invoice",
            "receivedDate": "2020-02-17",
            "enrichment": {
                "sender": {
                    "top": 5,
                    "type": "businessEntity",
                    "subtype": "supplier"
                }
            }
        }''',
        'application/json'
    )
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, files=files)

if response.status_code in [200, 201]:
    print("Document submitted successfully!")
    print("ID:", response.json().get("id"))
else:
    print("Submission failed")
    print("Status Code:", response.status_code)
    print("Response:", response.text)

Step 3: Retrieving Extracted Data

Using the job ID, we retrieve the results. Replace {id} with the ID in the previous output. From the SAP Document Information Extraction interface, you’ll also see your extracted fields formatted.

The extracted fields (like receiver address, receiver name, document date, and net amount) are returned with confidence scores, allowing us to evaluate the reliability of each extracted field.

You get the actual confidence scores via the DOX API instead of an extraction confidence range on the interface.

url = f"https://<TENANT>.ap10.doc.cloud.sap/document-information-
extraction/v1/document/jobs/{ID}"
response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    fields = data.get("extraction", {}).get("headerFields", [])

    if not fields:
        print("No header fields extracted.")
    else:
        print("Extracted Fields:")
        for field in fields:
            print(f"- {field['name']}: {field['value']} (confidence: {round(field['confidence'], 2)})")
else:
    print("Failed to retrieve job data")
    print("Status:", response.status_code)
    print("Response:", response.text)

Step 4: Document Confidence Scoring and Mandatory Field Check

We define a list of mandatory fields and set a minimum confidence threshold (e.g., 70%).

The Document Confidence Score is reflected at the end of the output after checking for matching and missing fields.

min_confidence = 0.7  # threshold to flag low-match fields

mandatory_fields = {
    "receiverName": "Buyer Name",
    "receiverAddress": "Buyer Address",
    "documentDate": "Date Issued",
    "documentNumber": "Invoice Number",
    "currencyCode": "Currency",
    "taxAmount": "VAT Value",
    "senderAddress": "Company Address",
    "senderName": "Company Name",
    "taxId": "Tax ID"
}

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    fields = data.get("extraction", {}).get("headerFields", [])
    
    # Convert extracted fields into a dictionary: name => field
    extracted = {f["name"]: f for f in fields}
    
    total_score = 0
    max_score = len(mandatory_fields)
    low_match_flags = []

    print("Mandatory Field Check:\n")

    for key, label in mandatory_fields.items():
        field = extracted.get(key)
        if field:
            total_score += 1  # Presence of field
            print(f"{label} ({key}): {field['value']}") 
        else:
            print(f"{label} ({key}): MISSING")

    print("\nResult Summary:")
    print(f"Fields Found: {total_score}/{max_score}")
    
    if total_score < max_score:
        print("\nLow Match Fields:")
        # Check for missing fields and flag low match
        for key, label in mandatory_fields.items():
            if key not in extracted:
                print(f" - {label} ({key})")

    document_confidence_score = round((total_score / max_score) * 100, 2)
    print(f"\nDocument Confidence Score: {document_confidence_score}%")

else:
    print("Failed to fetch job results.")
    print(f"Status Code: {response.status_code}")
    print(f"Response: {response.text}")

Future Expansion

For integration and tracking – you’ll want your enterprise system as part of the Document Information Extraction process. While keeping all validation logic in Python, you can expand the case with fuzzy matching, error handling, and real contract databases, including SAP S/4HANA or SAP Build Process Automation:

  1. Pull real data dynamically
  2. Push results (e.g. approved/rejected invoices)
  3. Trigger workflows (emails, dashboards, auto-approval/review flagging etc.)
  4. Store validated invoice results in your backend
  5. Log confidence scores, mismatches, timestamps

All in all, this blog post provides a preliminary look into:

  • Invoice document posting and extraction with the SAP DOX API
  • Invoice validation
  • Confidence scoring

If you process high volumes of invoices, SAP Document Information Extraction can help you save countless hours and reduce errors.

Leave your thoughts or questions in the comment section below!

entry.title: Re: How to make "Delivery Note" field mandatory in GR/IR...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, the field "Delivery Note" (LFSNR) during Goods Receipt (Movement Type 101) is not mandatory by default.

Nevertheless, you can enforce this requirement using custom business logic, as SSCUIs do not provide direct control over the field's behaviour for inventory transactions.

Recommended Solution
You can utilise the Custom Logic App to implement a BAdI that validates the field during posting:

  • BAdI Name: MMIM_GR4 – Check Plant-Specific Fields for Goods Receipt
  • App: Custom Logic
  • Business Context: MM_IM_GOODS_RECEIPT

Use Case: Implement logic that checks whether the Delivery Note (field LFSNR) is filled. If it is empty, raise an error message.
IF im_header-deliverynote IS INITIAL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /BOBF/CX_FRW
EXPORTING textid = 'Delivery Note must be entered'.
ENDIF.

Let me know if it works

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Contract deactivation in REFX if Asset has no postings
entry.content:
Hi contract will have various statuses depending on what actions have been performed.

REL = Upon contract creation

ACT = contract has been activated

CANC = contract has been cancelled using a Notice

This means you first must cancel the notice that was given on the contract:

  1. Go to the Term tab
  2. Select the Notice Term
  3. Click on the Notice button
  4. In edit mode click on the Reverse Notice (undo) button
  5. Optionally, delete the notice via the "-" button.
  6. Save
  7. Status CANC is no longer visible

The next steps is to cancel the activation:

  1. In edit mode click on the "Reset Activation" (undo) button next to the status.
  2. Save
  3. Status ACTV is no longer visible

If you are getting error message RECN026 it means that there are already postings on the contract. You cannot deactivate a contract with postings so you will either have to reverse all the postings first (which is normally not possible in a real life situation).

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Webinars Recordings - Spanish and Portuguese
entry.content: Felicitaciones!!! para mi una gran ayuda, todo muy bien explicado

entry.title: Re: oninit rule not triggered after employee import
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from Employee Central Team.

Please check the permission is granted or not:

Manage permission role >> select corresponding role >> Employee Central Import settings >> Enable Business Rules for selected entities: job information

Handbook for your reference: Role-Based Permissions for Employee Data Import

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: ABT1N Choose transaction type and base value appropriate for asset values
entry.content:
Hello All,

During ABT1N when I select Transaction variant (Z12 = Intercompany, Net Method, Current Year, No Revenue) which is custom defined for client, I am getting the error message " Choose transaction type and base value appropriate for asset values"

In my testing I have used existing asset acquisition year & cap year = Current FY, and depreciation already posted until last period.

Any thoughts what could be the issue

entry.title: Re: LRN-191759 For this notification, is it triggered by...
entry.content: We've been testing LRN-191759 in our DEV environment but still the email is still not received by the subordinates. Are we missing any configuration? or anything to check?

entry.title: LMS user license type update automation
entry.content: how to automate LMS user license type update to Functional and Active?

entry.title: Providing HR Business Partner Admin Access to SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I want to give my local HR Business Partners' access to run Learning Completion and Learning Needs reports on their locations.  What is your recommendation to give them access so they can see just their location vs everyone in our company?

It would be great if they could run this just on their 'Learning' page but if I need to set them up as an administrator, I can set that up also.  But I am having trouble limiting their 'view' so they can only see their location.

Your advice is appreciated.

entry.title: SAP system startup FMA

SAP Public Cloud Edition How to Enable MFA for Multiple Authentication at Login
For example, if I want to log in, I need a mobile phone verification code.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP system startup FMA
entry.content:
Please follow steps in the document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/configure-risk-based-authentication-for-application

entry.title: can we use Pain.001.001 for domestic payments in non-EU countries.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

With the mandate to migrate from SWIFT to ISO 20022 by 2026.

We have a project going on for one of our Japanese clients to migrate a manual process of banking to complete automation by developing PAIN.001.001.003 format for credit payments as suggested by the local bank here.

Now, Pain.001 is widely used for SEPA payments, but can we use the same format for non-EU countries for both local and overseas payments.

If we can, then what additional changes are required for doing this.

 

Pratik

entry.title: Re: Erroneous Authentication Popup when Previewing Fiori...
entry.content: I've been having this issue as well. The workaround that I've found is to delete all the browser data, and re-open it. I've had to set up a second profile in Chrome so I don't keep wiping out my history and settings on my regular profile.

entry.title: Re: IDEA integration for Turkey Incoming invoices
entry.content: Hi Martinlitalin, Thank you for the quick update. Additionally, do you know if DRC support automatic incoming invoice postings for Turkey?

entry.title: Re: SAP AI Core Generative AI Hubのプロンプトレジストリ機能を解き明かす
entry.content:
@noseUD さん、コメントいただきましてありがとうございます。ご返信遅れまして申し訳ありません。

ご認識いただいている通り、少なくとも現段階での提供機能としては、SAP AI Launchpad側の「Prompt Management」はあくまでデザインタイム向けの機能であり「Prompt Editor」等で作成したプロンプトをバージョン管理・カタログ化するための機能である一方、SAP AI Core側の機能である「Prompt Registry」は本ブログでも述べられている通り、アプリケーションのランタイムから直接参照可能なプロンプトのリモート管理機能を提供する形になっております。現時点では双方の直接的な連携機能は提供されていないと認識しております。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: WFA on Hana Succession Metric: Number of Nomination Deleted Records Showing
entry.content:
Hi @MissZP ,

The status 3 exclusion is used to exclude/stop reporting as a count for the nomination. If you're looking to exclude the entire nomination completely, you'll have to write complex logic in the Calculated Columns to assign a status from the beginning of the nomination to the end of the nomination to exclude it completely.

Best regards,
Keegan

entry.title: 收入認列錯誤
entry.content:
HI SAP

我看目前的收入確認碼的文檔介紹都是將在開立客戶發票的時候就會直接認列收入科目，

但我認知的收入確認應該是要在開發票的時候先認遞延收入，等到月底進行收入確認運行時再根據比例將遞延收入轉出到實際收入科目，這樣才有符合收入確認的用意。

現在的文檔內容都是將收入確認及應計收入對沖，但實際的開票認列的收入科目不會有後續轉換的動作，想再詢問各位老師有沒有什麼解決方案?

entry.title: Re: Nested Post Calls in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @YashminBehera It's not immediately clear from the screenshot what went wrong, except 400 error message, that indicate an issue with one or more parameters — potentially in the URL or the JSON payload of the request.

I’d recommend breaking the request into two parts:

  1. First, try posting the sales order header first.
  2. Once that succeeds, follow up with a separate request to post the sales order item(s).

You can refer to the example parameters (click on example value) for A_Sales_Order below from SAP API Hub:

  1. POST > A_SalesOrder Header
  2. POST > A_SalesOrder('{SalesOrder}')/to_item

You can also test the API call using cURL or Postman to isolate the issue outside of SAP Build Apps. Additionally, inspect the request directly from the SAP Build Apps preview by opening Chrome Developer Tools:

  • Go to the Network tab
  • Filter by Fetch/XHR
  • Review the actual request headers and payload being sent

This should give you better visibility into what's being passed and where the issue might be occurring.
Hope it helps.

entry.title: How to get the ID (description) of the parent element in the current Drill Down using SAC script
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When clicking drill down button, we want to get the ID (description) of the parent element of the hierarchy. But we can't find a method that does this in the documentation or forums. We know the getHierarchyLevel() API can get the hierarchy level, but we want the info of parent element.

Is there any way to implement this? Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @DavidRaykovitz ,

General Display Name is designed to be used across modules including Learning, so there is automatic sync between BizX and LMS in case it is changed. I saw in the Desire, as you mentioned, you'd expect different search result sort in BizX and Learning Administration. I wonder why do you need different search behavior in the two modules? 

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Multiple Node Js Module In SAP CAPM Application
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing issues with the configuration of the multiple node js module in the SAP BTP Capm Application.

High level application structure : 

app : approuter is defined here.

db : database module is defined here, I am able to deploy it and its working correctly,

srv : here I have create 3 node js application, node1, node2 and node3 application.

Expectation : After the deployment of the CAPM application. node1, node2 and node3 application must be 3 different routes and it will be accessible via approuter only.

Currently stuck : I am not able to understand how I can configure the 3 services in the mta.

My MTA looks like this : 

 

And Approuter : 

Please guide me where I am doing wrong.

entry.title: [sap build] application backend failed to load logic canvas
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are having some issues with the application backend logic canvas failing to load. We have no idea how this happened in the first place. We thought it was isolated to a single project, but creating a new application backend still has the issue.

If we add a 'list records' function, the canvas works. However, if we add other functions (retrieve, create, update, delete), and then selecting the entity it automatically shows this error.

Any help to fix this is much appreciated. Thanks!

Windows 11 Home 24H2 26100.3775 Windows Feature Experience Pack 1000.26100.66.0

' Connecting to on-premise systems via principle propagation is not possible."


I am trying it in VSCode. I tried both BAS destinations and subaccount destinations as BAS runs in a different subaccount.

@LucasMagriniRigo @MioYasutake

entry.title: Breakdowns Don’t Hurt — Surprises Do. Why Smarter MRO Planning Matters Now More Than Ever
entry.content:
Breakdowns Don’t Hurt — Surprises Do.
Why Smarter MRO Planning Matters Now More Than Ever

Tariff Hikes Disrupting Spares Supply ChainTariffs. Delays. Stockouts. With new U.S. tariff hikes back on the table, SAP Integrated Business Planning (SAP IBP) for MRO is the one tool that helps you stay ahead — before disruptions hit your budget.

This message couldn’t be more timely. With rising global trade tensions and renewed tariffs — particularly from the U.S. on imports from China — MRO supply chains are once again under pressure. And this isn’t just about new equipment. These changes directly impact the availability of spare parts and the maintenance services that keep critical operations running.

As The Guardian put it: “Volatile freight costs and congestion are now the norm.” So how do you plan maintenance when rules, costs, and lead times keep changing?

 

The Spreadsheet Trap: Why Old Tools Fail in Today’s MRO Supply Chain

Spreadsheets and disconnected systems might feel safe — until a sudden tariff hits. These outdated tools are slow, prone to error, and can’t handle real-time change — like a 50% spike in part costs. Without live insights, you risk overstocking (tying up cash) or running out (halting production). Maintenance, procurement, and logistics teams often operate in silos — guessing rather than planning.

The result? Avoidable downtime that drains profits. Old tools are like navigating a storm with a broken compass — they leave you stranded.

A Game-Changing Solution

SAP Integrated Business Planning (SAP IBP) for MRO is a cloud-based planning solution tailored for maintenance and operations teams. It connects seamlessly to your ERP system (e.g., SAP S/4HANA or SAP ECC), bringing together real-time data from maintenance, inventory, procurement, and suppliers.

SAP IBP MRO Integration with Source ECC or S/4 ERP

Think of it as your Intelligent Planning Cockpit — powered by AI — to help forecast needs, simulate risks, and optimise MRO spend with a single, unified view.

What You Can Do With SAP IBP for MRO: 3 Real-World Use Cases

1. Spare Parts Forecasting Based on Equipment Risk

Pain: Frequent unplanned breakdowns and stockouts of critical parts

Use AI to analyse usage history, failure trends, and asset risk profiles to forecast spare parts demand — without needing maintenance orders. Anticipate early and align sourcing across locations.

Business Impact: Fewer stockouts and emergency orders.

2. Balance Inventory Across Sites to Free Up Capital

Pain: Overstocked warehouses in one region, shortages in another

Leverage multi-echelon inventory optimisation to set ideal stock levels and reorder points across all sites. Rebalance parts before issuing new purchase orders.

Business Impact: Reduced working capital and better use of available stock.

3. Run Cost Simulations to Mitigate Tariff and Supply Risks

Pain: Sudden tariffs or shipping delays disrupting budgets

Use ‘what-if’ simulations to understand the cost and impact of external shocks — like tariffs or supplier changes. Explore alternate vendors, delivery routes, or stock strategies. Get live updates from suppliers via SAP Business Network.

Business Impact: Less financial risk, more plan stability.

Why It Matters

This isn’t just about avoiding disruption — it’s about staying ahead. SAP IBP for MRO connects the dots between maintenance, procurement, and suppliers. It gives you AI-powered foresight, flexibility, and global scalability to act — before surprises cost you.

Ready for What’s Next: AI-Powered, Risk-Aware MRO Planning

SAP IBP for MRO continues to evolve with intelligent capabilities that:

  • Detect early signs of supply chain or geopolitical risks
  • Model cost or lead time shifts in advance
  • Synchronise budgets, maintenance plans, and supplier strategies
It’s more than a planning tool — it’s your risk radar, your budget optimiser, and your supply chain co-pilot.

Resources

  • 📚SAP IBP for MRO Product Page »
  • 💡SAP IBP Community »
  • 🎓SAP IBP Learning Journey »
  • 🔴See it Live at Mastering SAP Gold Coast 2025 »

If you’re serious about resilient operations, smarter sourcing, and avoiding the next big surprise — now’s the time to act.

With SAP IBP for MRO, you don’t just plan for tomorrow. You control it.

entry.title: Re: Integrating Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud V2: A Unified Contact Center Experience

entry.title: Package issue in freight order TransportationOrderGenericRequest
entry.content:
Dear SAP expert,

i have one question regarding to the pack operations in TM module.  We have two steps packs in 3rd WMS system.  the first step to put the goods into the boxes, 2nd step to put the boxes into pallet. 

Now the first steps boxes will send back to ERP with HU. 

I know that the new function of package unit will be used in freight order.   We want to handled the boxes and pallet during freight order creation by webservice interface TransportationOrderGenericRequest .   is it possible to do that?  or any enhancement is required?

entry.title: Re: No Rounding rule should happen for a Condition type
entry.content: Why not put that rule as part of your transformation in the integration layer ?-- that we need to know worry about changing or applying any rounding-related changes in the SAP S4.

entry.title: Re: 2SL Transport management
entry.content:
Hi there,

"Is there any application where I can see and edit the transport content?"

==>For CBC managed 2SL system, the detailed content about the change project can not be seen by customer.

3142591 - CBC : Q2P Selective transport not possible 

 "it is my understanding that in Production, I import the configuration via Import Collection app like in 3SL, right? "

==>Please check Transport Configuration
Execute the movement of the transport recordings (step 2) from Q-System to P-System via the SAP Central Business Configuration tab 'System' and the 'Release Transport' button (dependent objects from step 3 and step 4 must not be pending). The transport will be queued into the P-System and executed at approximately 10 p.m. of the system’s data center time (9 p.m. if in a daylight saving time).

  • Manual transport moves can be done via the Import Collection app in the P-System to get configuration changes imported before 10/9 p.m. (system data center time). Note that import via Import Collection app is not possible for the initial transport to the P-system.
  • An automatic health check in the Q-System and P-System process gets generated and SAP support is automatically notified if an import error occurs and will diagnose and resolve the issue. Implementation Project in the workspace will be unlocked after transport issue resolved.

Best Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: Re: RAP Application with two Root View Entity with Associ...
entry.content:
Hi @suzanne_alivand ,

I got your point that we cannot implement create operation in child entity.

but there any way out other than composition to implement crud operations in child and parent entity.

i tried to implement but face same issue that dependent entity cannot implement create operation ?

do you have any way out from this ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP custom code analysis using SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,

Yes, I am sure it is standard SAP object. In fact, I raised the same to SAP using case Case 296546/2025 - ATC error coming from standard SAP objects - SAP For Me

But I was informed that ATC will check all the unreleased SAP objects. But this is not expected from ATC. As a customer, different SAP released/non-released objects are used by custom program. I wonder why it is not possible to exclude SAP object from ATC code check. In fact, this is also mentioned by you in your FAQ blog post below Remote Code Analysis in ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) – ... - SAP Community

Thanks,
Mainak

entry.title: Regarding the error message in In-House Repair (3XK)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm currently testing the Scope Item In-House Repair (3XK), specifically in step 4.3.2 Create Quotation. I encountered an error message saying that I have entered too many responsible employees, even though I only input one.

Could you please help me understand the reason behind this error?

Thanks,

Noni

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Re: Editing custom hierarchy in SAC Story
entry.content: If you hover on the custom hierarchy, you should have edit button.

entry.title: Re: I_CurrencyStdVH
entry.content:
@induthiru 

I had the same issue in S/4HANA 2023 on-premise. I ended up creating a 'wrapper' cds view as shown below:

The annotations `@ObjectModel.modelingPattern` and `@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities` were necessary to make the CDS View appear in the Custom CDS View app.

entry.title: Re: Online course not being marked as completed for some...
entry.content:
Add to History on Pass – this checkbox should be ticked.

Add to History on Completion of All Content – this should also be checked.

Hello Everyone-

I want data ( attachments) collected in additional data collection in Onboarding 2.0 to get synced to Employee Profile,. Is this possible? If Yes Please let me know as how can this be done?

 

I followed the below links , but didnt get any solution?

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/onb-ec-integration-sending-data-from-custom-data-collection-to-the-employee/ba-p/13534703

Do you have any suggestions for addressing this issue? I would greatly appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: Re: How to Call RAP Actions with Table Types from a List Report
entry.content:
@pramod_teewaree 

Function doesn't support complex parameter. Because parameters for function can be passed only via URL and it has limited length. Therefore, for passing complex parameter, you need to opt for action.

Thanks,
Mainak

entry.title: Re: How to remove the managed system from ChaRM - SAP Sol...
entry.content: Hi SWU,

entry.title: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am using a fiori elements (+ extension api / v4 odata) and I have a table on the ObjectPage. This table is searchable and the search field is generated. I would like to extend this searchfield (change event) or table (delegate), but no matter what I do, it doesn't work. I have tried via a controller extension, manifest, overwriting functions (most cases not allowed).

My version 1.120.x uses technically a sap.ui.mdc.Table. Attaching or detaching events doesn't work either.

Why do I need this?
The search does not return records (or only from data type string). I'd like to add more filters, so the results will be more acurate by implementing a filterby.

I am wondering if this is possible?

Thanks in advance!

Noël

entry.title: Re: Extending Fiori Elements with the CodeEditor using FPE
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

I think you forgot the dependencies in your manifest.json:

 

{
	"sap.ui5": {
		"dependencies": {
			"libs": {
				"sap.ui.core": {},
				"sap.ui.codeeditor": {}
			}
		}
		
	}
}

Check out https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.codeeditor.CodeEditor/sample/sap.ui.codeeditor.sample.CodeEditor/code for an example.

Cheers,

Noël

entry.title: Multiple Drafts in RAP with Optimistic Merge
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Let's start with the context first. We have an existing app that was built with BOPF and oData v2 service on top of it. We built our own draft implementation as it was not available with BOPF. To simplify it, the main business object consists of a header and multiple items. You can think of it as a collaborative plan between multiple users. We allow users to work on this object in parallel as 95% of time, each user is updating own set of items. In our draft activation logic, we check if items, that has been modified by the user, have been modified by another user(s) in parallel. We simply compare "changed at" with the "changed at" value captured during draft creation. As I said, most of the time this works fine as users have their own sets of items and users can come up with a plan. Sometimes this does not work. In that case the first user wins and the loser needs to start again. This feature works really well for users and it's crucial for us.

Now we want to move this app to ABAP Cloud with RAP. Any idea how could this be achieved? I looked at the draft table generater by RAP. The problem is that the draft table has same primary key as the main table and it uses the same primary keys of the instances. Hence it's not possible to save multiple drafts into this table. Alternatively, I was thinking about items being own business objects and header being another object that simply links to these child objects. Unfortunately, I don't think this will work as the users expect that when they go to edit mode, they can update any item. We would have to create a draft for every child object and that would prevent users working on parallel as other users would not be able to create parallel draft.

Is there a way with unmanaged implementation to override draft logic that allows creation of parallel drafts (one draft per user) and own logic for draft activation? Is it possible to provide a custom implementation for methods related to draft handling? Could we simply extend draft table key with username to allow one draft per user? Or is there other way how to achieve this?

I've seen the previuew of "SAP Fiori Collaborative Draft" in ABAP RAP that is on the roadmap and should be available with 2508. This does not seem to fit our use case as in this case, the user needs to invite another person into editing. In our case, the users are working in parallel without necessary knowing about each other.

Thanks

entry.title: SAC - Story Calculate Entire Dataset Average
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working for calculating R square in STORY with output dataset of a predictive scenario.

My data looks like this:

ManufacturerSizeWattage1 pc USD
A300310
A400120
B5000.510
B600120

and the desired output should look like this

ManufacturerSizeWattage1 pc USDMean
A30031015
A40012015
B5000.51015
B60012015

with the mean of [1 pc USD], then I can get Sum of Square Total and R Square in advanced.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Develop and deploy a HTML (Angular/Vue/React) app on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) access S/4 On-premi
entry.content:
Hi @CAPMDeveloper00 

"Angular app create successfully, in folder `webapp`,".

The angular app shall be created under a separate folder named `webapp`.

 

@CAPMDeveloper00 @natalymoros 

During I writing this post, I don't get my github user for my SAP ID. Hence, I don't have the git repo in github. Now I got my github user, I will consider add the git repo later on.

 

Hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content:
Will the 'Customer Filter' helps?

Refer to Flexible Programming Model Explorer.

Or, you can using Extension to create your own SmartFilterBar for filtering.

For that I used attached Cron expression but the job is still running after 20th of that month also. 
If you have inputs to how to achieve it.

entry.title: Re: can we use Pain.001.001 for domestic payments in non-...
entry.content:
Hello Pratik,

As per my knowledge you can do this only if the bank will accept this file format/structure. If the bank does, then they can also provide you the detailed requirements.

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Error in SAC story indicating that a measure is hidden
entry.content: When creating a story on a model based on live connection to SAP Hana, an error is thrown indicating that some datapoints will not be displayed as the measure is hidden. Now the measure is not hidden in the story or in the back end (CDS view) as checked with the backend resources. Would like to know why the error may be displaying.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements extending search filter
entry.content: Thanks! Will dive in your tip. It should be triggered when using the Search field. I am using RAP as well, so the ObjectPage is generated out of the box. I could enhance that, but it is a big change.

entry.title: Re: DISTINCT OCRD from OINV
entry.content:
Hi,

Please give this a try:

SELECT distinct T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."CardType", T0."GroupCode"
, T0."CmpPrivate", T0."Address"
, cast(T0."Building" as nvarchar) as "Building"
, T0."StreetNo", T0."ZipCode"
, T0."City", T0."County", T0."State1", T0."Country", T0."CntctPrsn", T0."E_Mail"
, T0."Phone1", T0."LicTradNum", T2."Tel1", T2."U_Ext"
, T2."E_MailL"

FROM OCRD T0 INNER JOIN OINV T1 ON T0."CardCode" = T1."CardCode" INNER JOIN OCPR T2 ON T1."CntctCode" = T2."CntctCode"

WHERE T1."DocDate" >= '20240101'

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: DEPRECATED: req._queryOptions what to use to extract...
entry.content:
Hi Dinu, thanks for response but not sure what you mean. I cannot even use the above property -> 

console.log("Test:", req.query.limit);

and got below error: [cds] - ❗️Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'limit')
But using "req.http?.req?.query" works for me now.

entry.title: Re: Batch managing in SAP B1
entry.content: Hi @MarinaLevy , just to clarify, do you want to assign the same batch to the component & the finished item?

entry.title: Re: Trend Micro Deep Security reports HEU_AEGIS_CRYPT err...
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Is it not possible to just add an exception for the DI API in general?

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: How to limit column in an SAC story with rank values to top 50
entry.content:
I would like to know how a story with a table in SAP Analytic cloud can be filtered to display only records pertaining to top 50 values of a rank column in the story. I added the rank column on a existing measure using the 'Client Calculation' option available. Now I cannot access this new rank column like other measures as it is a runtime calculation. Can anyone let me know if this is feasible, if so, please let me know how.

 

 

Regards,
